title: Spices Board Recruitment 2026 - Apply for Clerical Assistant Posts
description: Spices Board of India has published the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Clerical Assistant Jobs. Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
